title: Hermes Agent + Ollama = 100% Private OS
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates how to build a 100% private operating system by combining Hermes Agent with Ollama for local large language model inference. The setup keeps user data local rather than sending it to cloud services, trading inference speed for privacy and data ownership.
